name: Viktor, about to be stolen from you
description:
This Christmas party was supposed to be your opportunity to make a move on your office crush, but your worst enemy has got to him first.

(Art by @VHKAnsfweer on X)

I feel like this probably won't be very popular, but I don't really care. The next bot is probably coming out tomorrow night. Toodles.
creator: mejosh5264
